feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Dragonlord's Predicament
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,766Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 737

Summary: Merlin's new Dragonlord powers come with some unforeseen side effects. When he's kidnapped by bandits, the new aspect of his powers makes itself known. But Merlin could've gotten himself out of the mess on his own, thank you very much, if only Arthur hadn't made it worse by rushing in and trying to save him.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)

entry.title: The Lies We Tell
entry.summary:
Author: Saladscream

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,543Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 228

Summary: It's a lie. Merlin isn’t a lightweight, dammit. It takes more than a couple of miserly pints of beer to send him rolling under the table, and anyone who dares to say anything to the contrary is a brazen liar and an unabashed twat.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Blessing of the Unicorn
entry.summary:
Author: TheNovelNovelist

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,568Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 7

Summary: In Camelot, legend has it that unicorns are benevolent creatures known to swoop in and save helpless madiens, allowing only women close enough to touch them Merlin thinks it’s not that simple, and he supposes he’s probably correct when one day a unicorn gives its favor to the Crown Prince, Arthur

entry.title: The Squires of Camelot
entry.summary:
Author: Basched

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,200Chapters: 172/?Kudos: 148

Summary: In a land of myth and a time of magic, destiny rests on the shoulders of five young boys, along with a lot of grueling work, dedication, and long hours of cleaning up after the new knights. They are the Squires of Camelot.

entry.title: Shared Assets
entry.summary:
Author: Noel803

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,971Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 284

Summary: Merlin and Arthur had always been like some old married couple, or so everyone said. But this was going a tad too far. What the hell did Merlin mean he had just as much a right to their shared assets as Arthur did? Since when did they share anything! Or the 5 things that Arthur is forced to “share” with Merlin, and the one thing he keeps all to himself. Just kidding, the 5 times Merlin steals Arthur’s shit and the one thing he can’t steal.

entry.title: Pas de Deux
entry.summary:
Author: Eye_of_Desdemona

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,527Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 71

Summary: “I have seen this all before,” Merlin’s voice was steely though his hands shook at his sides.The old druid merely shook his head, “You have seen visions, Emrys, possibilities. I am offering you a certainty. Arthur’s bane will be his demise. If the boy is left alive, there will be no legacy to Arthur’s reign, only a hazy memory of a sovereign that was born in blood and died in blood.”Merlin’s eyes widened, and a stinging sensation nestled its way into his skin as the druid’s magic filled the room.“The decision is yours to make. The Triple Goddess will make her’s in return.”ORIt was always going to be Arthur. Even if it meant taking the life of one of his own, Merlin was always going to choose the path that saw Arthur live. A seer offers Emrys a choice and a promise in one, and for once Merlin acts upon it.

  • Major Character Death

entry.title: Kill Your Darlings➳Merthur
entry.summary:
Author: asomina

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,074Chapters: 10/11Kudos: 253

Summary: There's something off about the way Merlin is looking at Arthur. He's nervous, awkward and instead of hiding his suspicious behaviour with insults or jokes. He drowns Arthur's concerns with kisses. or.... In which Mordred disguises himself as Merlin to destroy Camelot from the inside. However, he mistakenly believes Merlin and Arthur are in an extremely intense, romantic relationship. Maybe he embodies Merlin a little too well.   Aka the body swap AU no one asked for.Featuring band favourites: Flirty Gwaine, lesbian awaking Morgana, himbo Arthur, Mordred being confused and Merlin finally getting the day off he needed.

entry.title: It's A Small Crime (And I Got No Excuse)
entry.summary:
Author: amariram

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,011Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 59

Summary: “Are we waiting for your Arthur to have an audience? I'm sure my men will have captured him by now,” the man continued, crossing his arms with amusement.It was Merlin's sceptical sneer that broke Arthur's train of thought. He moved closer behind the rock wall to look at his face, and what he saw made him swallow hard. Merlin's gaze was lowered, but a bitter smile played on his lips as if the other man's words were the stupidest thing he had ever heard in his life.“For the last time...” Merlin finally said, raising his head and staring at him arrogantly. “He's not coming. He doesn't care about me.”Arthur's heart sank.The man just smiled and took another step towards Merlin. The belt holding his boots fell to the ground.“We'll see.” or Merlin has been kidnapped by Cenred’s men. Even though they haven’t spoken for weeks, Arthur goes to look for him.Struggling with resentment, they will both have to set aside their beliefs to find their way back to each other.

entry.title: Half a Crown
entry.summary:
Author: decidedlynotheterosexual

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,344Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 70

Summary: The chamber ceiling recedes, opens before them. Arthur thinks he could go far as the starless night, be swallowed there, in the belly of a great and terrible serpent. He is no-one; he is nothing. He needs another half to complete him, and without it, he is worse than dead.Arthur hears of the Écrevisse, a cave that shows both a man’s greatest fear and deepest desire. To prove himself, he goes alone. Without Merlin. Yet the cave brings Merlin to him, as Arthur’s fears and desires become one.

entry.title: Haunted Angel, Bright Knight
entry.summary:
Author: paugie_bran

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,820Chapters: 2/24Kudos: 5

Summary: In a medieval-modern fused world where magic is still illegal, Merlin, with no memory of his previous life, enters Camelot, now an eerie, grey maze of a place where elites train to become future political leaders. The professors are eccentric, the building seems to have a mind of its own, and unluckily for Merlin, combat classes are mandatory and tournaments are highly prized. The last thing he should be doing is falling for Arthur Pendragon, star swordsman, son of infamous anti-magic proponent Uther and massive whopping prat. Whose life he just can't seem to help saving. But history is threatening to repeat itself. As Merlin begins to see visions of Arthur's death, can he evade tragedy this time around?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.summary:
Author: Ace_Teagirl

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,196Chapters: 1/6Kudos: 2

entry.title: I'll Save You A Seat
entry.summary:
Author: sherrwin

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,446Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 15

Summary: This short story entails CEO Arthur Pendragon and the one that got away: Merlin Emrys. With a Little Twist: Along with Merlin, follows two young boys of his. His tremendous bundles of joy yet bane of his existence. Together, the two boys unintentionally pull the two lost lovers back together in the absolute most bizarre place: An airplanes’ first class cabin.What else could be said in that situation but, “That’s my son!"Who just so happens to grow up with a father like Merlin, one out of the ordinary. Disclaimer: Merlin has his magic solely for the plot however he wont be using it.

entry.title: Senior Assassin
entry.summary:
Author: irish_fish

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,843Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 11

Summary: “Arthur!” Merlin turned to him with a sunshine-y grin that dimpled his cheeks, “can I help you with something?” Arthur realized he should speak now. “Oh, um, yes. I’m supposed to give you my buy in money and then you’ll give it to your uncle, right?” “You convinced your father, then?” Merlin asked, his smile returning. Arthur chuckled and scratched the back of his now slightly warm neck, “Uh, no actually. He doesn’t know I’m doing this.” Merlin’s eyes flickered down for a second then met his again, “Well, I think that’s great! Um, I’m glad you’re joining us.”

entry.title: Dower the Stars by RurouniHime [Podfic]
entry.summary:
Author: Billyballz

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5Chapters: 3/8Kudos: 4

Summary: During a time of great prosperity in Albion, the Druids offer Emrys a precious gift. Arthur is not amused. (aka, "The Great Conjunction is at Hand, Everyone Kiss Merlin!") Podfic of the amazing work by RurouniHime!

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,452Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 24

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but sets in a motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy.

entry.title: [ART] High King of Albion
entry.summary:
Author: schweet_heart

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 0Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 104

Summary: "You're the last person I'd have expected to get emotional about this," Arthur said, catching Merlin's gaze in the mirror with a knowing smile. "It's just a crown, Merlin." "I know it is, you prat," Merlin said, reaching out to make some final adjustments. "But it's the High King's crown now, isn't it?" He sniffed. "And it's crooked." Created for Merthur Glompfest 2026.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
